hero.title: Hello, I'm Fadi Sameer Botros
hero.subtitle: Software engineer — Backend (Laravel)
hero.description: I build reliable APIs and Filament admin experiences, automate workflows with n8n, and ship solid foundations in HTML/CSS/JS and Blade with hands-on React/Vue work.

about.title: Profile
about.description1: Motivated software engineer focused on backend development with PHP/Laravel, workflow automation using n8n, and admin systems with FilamentPHP.
about.description2: Strong fundamentals in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Blade, with practical experience in React/Vue, applying MVC, RESTful design, events, queues, and Stripe integrations.
about.h1: CI/CD with GitHub Actions · Docker · Linux (Ubuntu)
about.h3: MySQL (indexing & tuning), SQL Server, and JMeter load testing

experience.title: Work experience
experience.lead: A path combining infrastructure, automation, and software engineering.

samware.b1: Data center: hands-on hardware installation—servers, switches, and storage in production DC.
samware.b2: Virtualization: assisted VMware ESXi deployment and managed virtualized server environments.
samware.b3: Automation: built an n8n monitoring bridge from Proxmox API to Telegram for instant alerts.

freelance.summary: Designing and shipping web systems and APIs with Laravel and Filament, plus Firebase integrations, payments, and load testing.

skills.title: Core skills
skills.lead: Skill groups aligned with my CV—no decorative percentage bars.

projects.title: Selected projects
projects.lead: Highlights: VisionMate and Wazefni — each with LinkedIn demos and posts.

visionmate.title: VisionMate
visionmate.description: Platform supporting people with visual impairments: Laravel & MySQL, React volunteer app, Filament admin, AI features and Stripe donations. Represented AIU at the Damascus International Fair (TEXPO).

wazefni.title: Wazefni
wazefni.description: Employment mediation app with AI-assisted CV building, job matching, employer-side candidate filtering, and skill tests. Shared on LinkedIn.

correspondence-management.title: Correspondence Management System
correspondence-management.description: Official correspondence workflow (requests, decisions, circulars, summons) with RBAC, automated serial numbering on approval, frozen records, and public QR verification. Laravel 13 & MySQL.

smart-expense.title: Smart Expense Tracker
smart-expense.description: Laravel 12, Firebase notifications, queued jobs, service layer and API resources. No public GitHub repo yet.

proxmox-alerts.title: Proxmox → Telegram alert system
proxmox-alerts.description: Monitoring automation bridging the Proxmox API to Telegram via n8n for instant infrastructure alerts.

graduation-system.title: Graduation Management System
graduation-system.description: Small student assignment to automate a few graduation-related steps (not a flagship product). Laravel & MySQL.

maestro.title: Maestro — musical instruments store
maestro.description: Full-stack store with MySQL CRUD, secure PHP authentication, and client-side JS validation.

civil-registry.title: Civil Registry System
civil-registry.description: Secure CRUD civil records management and authentication using ASP.NET Web Forms and SQL Server.
